title: Welcome to x402 - Coinbase Developer Documentation

title: x402 Exact EVM Payment Scheme Specification
quote: The facilitator cannot alter recipient address or amount — these are cryptographically bound to the signature. The facilitator's sole role is transaction broadcasting.

title: A2A x402 Extension: cryptocurrency payments for the Agent-to-Agent protocol
quote: A merchant agent responds with a payment-required message when charging for services; the client agent signs and sends payment-submitted; the merchant verifies and responds with payment-completed.

quote: Servers can operate in mixed mode, offering both free and paid tools simultaneously, with multi-chain payment options across EVM Mainnet: Base, Polygon, Avalanche and Solana.

title: x402 on Stellar: unlocking payments for the new agent economy
quote: Stellar natively supports three stablecoins: USDC, PYUSD, and USDY. Stablecoins are first-class citizens on the network, not bridged or wrapped assets. The entire cycle completes within 5 seconds.

title: X402 Protocol: The HTTP-native Payment Standard for Autonomous AI Commerce
quote: The deferred scheme batches multiple payments into periodic on-chain settlements while maintaining instant finality guarantees, supporting millions of transactions per second for use cases like web crawling.

title: The x402 Facilitator Problem: How to Remove the Centralized Trust Bottleneck
quote: A compromised facilitator can claim payments settled when they did not. The facilitator can refuse to verify or settle valid payments — since it is the only settlement path, a censoring facilitator locks clients out. If the centralized endpoint goes offline, every x402-gated service stops accepting payments.
